name: serena
install_doc: README: `claude mcp add serena -- uvx --from git+https://github.com/oraios/serena serena start-mcp-server`. THOL installs the same pinned version as a binary (`uv tool install git+https://github.com/oraios/serena@v1.5.3`) because uvx re-resolves git on every spawn (~5-10s), exceeding the headless tool-snapshot window — documented deviation, identical code. Context `claude-code` (the README's `ide-assistant` is deprecated and aliases to it).
notes: LSP-backed symbol-level retrieval and editing MCP, pinned to release v1.5.3. Web dashboard and GUI log window disabled: headless benchmark runs must not open browser windows or bind dashboard ports (one server per run would collide); no effect on token behavior.
